data.title: Implement Task Service state machine & Spanner DDL
data.description: Deploy canonical Tasks table schema interleaved under Workstreams. Enforce deterministic state transitions: UNTRIAGED -> TRIAGED -> IN_PROGRESS -> PENDING_REVIEW -> COMPLETED.

data.title: Design capability-based routing logic in Task Fulfillment
data.description: Decouple task dispatching. Match execution parameters to route cognitive tasks to Sobi, and engineering workflows to Jetski Capsules.

data.title: Implement memory security boundaries & MemoryACLs
data.description: Set up logical and cryptographic separation across four tiers (Private, Workstream, Team, Global) in Spanner. Enforce HITL validation for team writes.

data.title: Create interactive widget state machine for Feed Service
data.description: Handle action buttons (e.g. APPROVE_CL) inside collaborative activity cards. Propagate verified user events to Task Service.

data.title: Build Jetski PTY watchdog and compiler error harvester
data.description: Deploy PTY supervisor inside capsules to intercept failures. Parse compiler AST strings and query Memory DB for known remediation patterns.

data.title: Implement hybrid search using BM25 and Vector Fusion (RRF)
data.description: Combine full-text token matching and ScaNN approximate nearest neighbor queries in Spanner using Reciprocal Rank Fusion.
